plan.failureSummary: The deterministic click action failed because the cached selectors for the 'Documentation' link under the 'Resources' dropdown could not resolve any element. This indicates a layout or structural regression on the Checkly website.
observedIndicators: selectorFailedDuringPageAi === false but click tool call failed with FAILED! Unable to resolve HTML element
Checkly homepage navigation menu changed (presence of 'Developers' dropdown in failure screenshot)
Recent history shows consecutive failures in DETERMINISTIC mode, while past runs were successful

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry test
remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache and re-run the test to allow autonomous mode to discover the new selectors and rebuild the cache.

remediationSteps.summary: Refine the AI prompt to reflect the header layout changes
remediationSteps.details: If the 'Documentation' link has moved from 'Resources' to the new 'Developers' dropdown, update the semantic prompt from 'Click on the Resources dropdown menu...' to 'Navigate to the developer docs' or 'Click on the Developers dropdown menu...' to make it more resilient.

plan.notes: The failure screenshot shows that the Checkly homepage header now has a 'Developers' dropdown and a 'Resources' dropdown. The 'Documentation' link might have moved or the dropdown's DOM structure changed, rendering the cached selectors invalid. Clearing the page.ai cache and letting the AI re-evaluate autonomously should resolve this.
